valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Tue 23 Jun 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Wed 24 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: High Fisher 1029 expected German Bight 1021 by 1800 Tuesday. New low expected 100 miles southwest of Iceland 999 by same time
